The new venue will offer locals and tourists another opportunity to experience the restaurant's offering without traveling to the original location.

news.title: Voor een prikkie uit eten in Amsterdam – hoe kan dat in deze dure tijd? ‘Ik verkoop elke tafel 3, 4 keer per avond’ - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

This article explores how restaurants in Amsterdam are managing to offer affordable dining despite the city's high costs, featuring insights from restaurant owners who maximize table turnover (selling each table 3-4 times per evening). Visitors to Amsterdam looking for budget-friendly meal options will find this useful, as it reveals the business strategies behind affordable eating in an otherwise expensive city. The piece highlights practical solutions for enjoying restaurant meals without breaking the bank in Amsterdam.

news.title: Sergio Herman sluit zijn twee Antwerpse restaurants, waaronder sterrenzaak Le Pristine - Nieuwsblad
news.summary:
# Summary

Renowned chef Sergio Herman is closing both of his Antwerp restaurants, including the Michelin-starred restaurant Le Pristine. This is significant for food lovers visiting Antwerp, as it means losing access to high-end fine dining experiences from one of Belgium's most celebrated chefs. Visitors interested in gourmet cuisine will need to seek alternative upscale dining options in the city.

If you're visiting the area and enjoy specialty coffee, this newly opened spot is worth checking out, though you should expect waits given its immediate popularity.

news.title: Slava Ukraina restaurant closes in Tallinn after surviving arson - ERR
news.summary:
# Summary

Slava Ukraina, a Ukrainian restaurant in Tallinn, has permanently closed despite surviving an arson attack. The closure is notable for visitors interested in Ukrainian cuisine in Estonia's capital, as the restaurant had apparently overcome the security threat from the arson incident but ultimately could not continue operations. This represents the loss of a specific ethnic dining option in Tallinn's restaurant scene.
